name: Surya Medallion — Peetal
description: Hand-finished peetal (brass) medallion with radiating rays—warm tone, solid weight, made to catch light on a shelf or altar.

name: Ganesha Miniature — Peetal
description: Compact peetal cast with a soft patina. Ideal for desks and small niches—pure metal, no base materials.

name: Lotus Aura Panel — Peetal & Jasta
description: Layered metal panel: peetal lotus geometry with jasta (zinc) accents for contrast—pairs well with warm indirect lighting.

name: Atlas Bust — Peetal Cast
description: Contemplative bust in peetal with subtle texture and a soft aged patina—metal throughout, sized for modern shelves.

name: Navigator Figure — Jasta
description: Slim silhouette in jasta (zinc) with a brushed peetal compass base—cool grey tone with warm brass detail.

name: Scribe Relief Plaque — Peetal
description: Low-relief peetal plaque—metal only, great above a reading nook or study wall.

name: Peetal Keepsake Box
description: Hinged peetal box with etched border—lined interior for jewelry or notes; all metal shell.

name: Celebration Peetal Tray
description: Hammered peetal serving tray with raised rim—food-safe lacquer inside; solid brass-family metal, not wood or plastic.

name: Aurora Peetal Urn
description: Tall peetal vessel with a satin gradient and a jasta ring at the foot—flowers optional; metal body only.

name: Mist Jaali Panel — Peetal
description: Cutwork peetal panel in a cool neutral fret—mount on a wall or lean on a shelf; metal craft, not fabric.

name: Arc Peetal Floor Lamp
description: Arc in solid peetal with a jasta counterweight base—dimmable LED; warm 2700K default for relaxed evenings.
